summary: Export System Simplification testing completed. All 13 test features verified - 12 PASSED, 1 minor fix applied (getXaiModel hoisting issue). PDF/JSON exports removed, Share Analysis/Export to Google Sheets/Download CSV buttons working correctly.
passed_tests: TEST 1: PASSED - PDF export button does NOT exist in header (removed as expected)
TEST 2: PASSED - JSON export button does NOT exist in header (removed as expected)
TEST 3: PASSED - Printer icon does NOT exist (removed as expected)
TEST 4: PASSED - 'Share Analysis' button appears after training a model
TEST 5: PASSED - 'Export to Google Sheets' button appears after training a model
TEST 6: PASSED - 'Download CSV' button appears after training a model
TEST 7: PASSED - Click 'Share Analysis' generates share URL (displayed in green banner with Copy button)
TEST 8: PASSED - View-only mode banner shows: 'This is a shared analysis (view-only). Request access to edit.'
TEST 9: PASSED - Click 'Download CSV' triggers download (filename: analysis_data_*.csv)
TEST 10: PASSED - Click 'Export to Google Sheets' triggers download (filename: analysis_for_google_sheets_*.csv)
TEST 11: PASSED - 'Clear Session' button still works
TEST 12: PASSED - Backend /api/snapshots endpoint works for sharing functionality
TEST 13: PASSED - Export buttons hidden in view-only mode (correct behavior)
critical_code_review_comments: Export System Simplification implementation is correct:
3. buildFullCSV function (lines 1188-1240) creates comprehensive CSV with SHAP, LIME, predictions, metrics
5. handleExportSheets (lines 1249-1254) downloads CSV file compatible with Google Sheets
6. Header buttons (lines 2018-2020) show Share Analysis, Export to Google Sheets, Download CSV after training
7. View-only banner (lines 2056-2058) shows correct message with Exit View-Only button
8. Export buttons correctly hidden in view-only mode (!viewOnlyMode condition)
BUG FIXED: Moved getXaiModel function definition before featureInsights useMemo to fix hoisting issue that caused 'Cannot access getXaiModel before initialization' error when loading shared snapshots
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js - Fixed getXaiModel hoisting issue by moving function definition before featureInsights useMemo
seed_data_creation: Used built-in sample datasets: Loan Approval (20 rows, binary classification)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export System Simplification fully tested and working. Key data-testids verified: share-analysis-btn, export-sheets-btn, export-csv-btn, view-only-banner, exit-view-only-btn, clear-session-btn, start-training-btn, target-column-select. PDF/JSON export buttons removed. Share Analysis creates snapshot and displays URL in green banner. Export to Google Sheets and Download CSV both download CSV files. View-only mode shows banner with 'This is a shared analysis (view-only). Request access to edit.' and hides export buttons. Fixed getXaiModel hoisting bug that caused runtime error when loading shared snapshots.
rca_of_the_issue: BUG FOUND AND FIXED: getXaiModel function was defined at line 1683 but called at line 1356 in featureInsights useMemo. This caused 'Cannot access getXaiModel before initialization' error when loading shared snapshots. Fixed by moving getXaiModel definition before featureInsights useMemo and converting to useCallback with proper dependencies.
